englishDefinitions: A reference to the 1970s, especially when talking about cocaine use or the cultural image of that decade.
persianTranslation: ارجاع به دههٔ ۱۹۷۰ و مصرف کوکائین
examples: The movie has a cocaine-70s style that feels flashy and reckless.
The artist was inspired by the cocaine 70s scene in New York.
That design brings back the cocaine 70s aesthetic.
